_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Kashi Vishwanath Temple
temples.description: One of India's most revered Shiva temples and a Jyotirlinga shrine in Varanasi.

temples.name: Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Mandir
temples.description: A major Rama temple at Ayodhya, one of North India's most important pilgrimage cities.

temples.name: Shri Krishna Janmabhoomi Temple
temples.description: A major Krishna pilgrimage site in Mathura, the traditional birthplace city of Lord Krishna.

temples.name: Vindhyavasini Devi Temple
temples.description: A major Devi temple at Vindhyachal and one of Uttar Pradesh's important Shakti pilgrimage sites.

temples.name: Hanuman Garhi
temples.description: A prominent Hanuman temple in Ayodhya and a common pilgrimage stop before Ram temple darshan.
